zh.Middleton-by-Warrington, Lancashire, Eng: 英國藍卡爾米德萊頓 白 沃林頓
zh.Middleton by Warrington, Lancashire, Eng: 英國藍卡爾米德萊頓 白 沃林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Langley於1208年出生在英國藍卡爾米德萊頓 白 沃林頓時，他的父親Thomas de Langely25歲，母親Mary of Middleton21歲。他於1237年與Mary of Middleton在英國藍卡爾米德萊頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1273年享年66歲。

zh-hans.Middleton-by-Warrington, Lancashire, Eng: 英国藍卡爾米德萊頓 白 沃林頓

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey de Langley于1208年出生在英国藍卡爾米德萊頓 白 沃林頓时，他的父亲Thomas de Langely25岁，母亲Mary of Middleton21岁。他于1237年与Mary of Middleton在英国藍卡爾米德萊頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1273年享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Langley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Langley or Longley (in Kent, Sussex, Hertfordshire, Norfolk, Somerset, Shrops, Lancashire, Durham, and many other counties), themselves from Old English lang ‘long’ + lēah ‘wood, glade, clearing’.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Langlif (Old Norse Langlíf ‘long’ + ‘life’ or ‘body’).

variants.name: Langlais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Marcel, Normand, Albertine, Armand, Cecile, Enoil, Herve, Jacques, Laurent.
French: ethnic name for an Englishman, from Anglais ‘Englishman’, with fused definite article l'. Compare Langley .

History: Daniel Sargent dit Sérien and Langlais from Worcester, MA married Marguerite Lavoie in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1718. Joseph Weber dit Langlais from Boston, MA married Marie-Charlotte Guillet in Cap Saint-Ignace, QC, in 1725.

variants.name: Longley
meanings: English (mainly Nottinghamshire and South Yorkshire): variant of   Langley  . Compare   Longpre   2.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Langley was born in 1208, in Middleton by Warrington, Lancashire, England, his father, Thomas de Langely, was 25 and his mother, Mary of Middleton, was 21. He married Mary of Middleton in 1237, in Middleton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1273, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Langley est né en 1208, à Middleton by Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Langely, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary of Middleton, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mary of Middleton en 1237, à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1273, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de Langley 1208 in Middleton by Warrington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Langely 25 und seine Mutter Mary of Middleton 21. Er hat 1237 in Middleton, Lancashire, England Mary of Middleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1273 im Alter von 66 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Langley è nato il nel 1208 nel Middleton by Warrington, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Langely, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mary of Middleton, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mary of Middleton nel 1237, nel Middleton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1273, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Langleyが1208年にイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトン ビー ワーリントンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Langelyは25歳，母Mary of Middletonは21歳であった。1237年にイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンでMary of Middletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1273年に66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Langley(이)가 1208년 영국 랭카실르 미들레턴 비 워링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Langely(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary of Middleton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1237년 영국 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 Mary of Middleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1273년 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Langley nasceu em 1208, em Middleton by Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Langely, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary of Middleton, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary of Middleton em 1237, em Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1273, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Langley родился в 1208 г. в местности миддлетон би варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Langely было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary of Middleton, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary of Middleton в 1237 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1273 г. в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey de Langley nació en 1208, en Middleton by Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Langely, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary of Middleton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mary of Middleton en 1237, en Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1273, a la edad de 66 años.
